description:
Enforces rule_sale_order_nl_scope (wolfinne_ifms_access/security/ifms_record_rules.xml):
  a Niederlassungsleitung user's Quotations list is scoped to their own
  Niederlassung (department_id), regardless of what else exists in the system.
  This is deliberately end-to-end (real login, real list view) rather than a
  duplicate of the existing ORM-level test_nl_sees_own_niederlassung /
  test_nl_does_not_see_other_niederlassung unit tests.

elements.name: Niederlassungsleitung's quotations list excludes other branches

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
a test customer "NLSCOPE Test Kunde" with default payment terms "30 Tage netto" exists
a quotation named "NLSCOPE-WIEN" exists for customer "NLSCOPE Test Kunde" with branch "Niederlassung Wien"
a quotation named "NLSCOPE-STMK" exists for customer "NLSCOPE Test Kunde" with branch "Niederlassung Steiermark"
quotation "NLSCOPE-WIEN" has payment terms "30 Tage netto" taken over from the customer
I am logged in as a "Niederlassungsleiter"
I navigate to Quotations
I remove the "Meine Angebote" filter
the quotations list shows "NLSCOPE-WIEN"
the quotations list does not show "NLSCOPE-STMK"

name: Access Rights — Niederlassungsleitung sees only their own branch

description: Verify that a valid user can log in and the UI is displayed in German.

elements.name: Successful login redirects to the home dashboard

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I open the Odoo login page
I log in as a "Bereichsleiter"
I am on the home dashboard
the interface is in German

name: Login

description:
"Kollidierende Schichten ansehen" in the conflict warning must open the
  conflict view, not crash the client with an Odoo Client Error (OwlError).

elements.name: Viewing colliding shifts from the conflict warning does not crash the client

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
two overlapping shifts exist for "Szandra Ugljesic"
I navigate to the Planning Gantt
I edit the first shift for "Szandra Ugljesic"
I click "Kollidierende Schichten ansehen"
no Odoo client error is shown
the "Kollidierende Schichten" filter is applied

name: Planning Gantt — conflicting shifts view (Task #121 regression)

description:
Show the contracted hours (Zugewiesene Zeit / Kontrollstunden) next to the
  planned hours on each project row in the Planning Gantt, so planners can
  see at a glance whether an Objekt is under- or over-staffed against its
  contract, without breaking the existing Gantt visuals.
  Requires: fixture property "Testobjekt Kontrollstunden BDD" linked to customer "IFMS GmbH".

elements.name: Contracted-vs-planned indicator appears on project rows without disturbing existing row controls

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
a property "Testobjekt Kontrollstunden BDD" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH"
a project "Objekt Kontrollstunden BDD" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH" and property "Testobjekt Kontrollstunden BDD" managed by "Bereichsleiter" with Monday control hours of 8 hours
I am logged in as a "Bereichsleiter"
I navigate to the Planning Gantt grouped by project
I switch the Gantt to week scale
the project row for "Objekt Kontrollstunden BDD" shows a contracted-hours indicator
the add-open-shifts button is still visible on the project row for "Objekt Kontrollstunden BDD"

elements.name: Weekend and holiday column tinting is unaffected by the new indicator

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
a property "Testobjekt Kontrollstunden BDD" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH"
a project "Objekt Kontrollstunden BDD" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH" and property "Testobjekt Kontrollstunden BDD" managed by "Bereichsleiter" with Monday control hours of 8 hours
I am logged in as a "Bereichsleiter"
I navigate to the Planning Gantt grouped by project
I switch the Gantt to month scale
weekend or holiday columns are still tinted in the Gantt

elements.name: Editing a project's control hours updates the Gantt indicator on reload

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
a property "Testobjekt Kontrollstunden BDD" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH"
a project "Objekt Kontrollstunden BDD" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH" and property "Testobjekt Kontrollstunden BDD" managed by "Bereichsleiter" with Monday control hours of 8 hours
I am logged in as a "Bereichsleiter"
I navigate to the Planning Gantt grouped by project
I switch the Gantt to month scale
the project row for "Objekt Kontrollstunden BDD" shows a contracted-hours indicator for Monday hours of 8
the Monday control hours for project "Objekt Kontrollstunden BDD" are changed to 16 hours
I reload the Planning Gantt
I switch the Gantt to month scale
the project row for "Objekt Kontrollstunden BDD" shows a contracted-hours indicator for Monday hours of 16

name: Planning Gantt — contracted vs. planned hours indicator (Kontrollstunden)

description:
"My Team" must expand to every employee in the management hierarchy, not
  just direct reports — previously only direct reports were selectable/visible.
  Requires: fixture employees "Peter Huber" (reports to Bereichsleiter) and
  "Anna Mayer" (reports to Peter Huber) from "the standard IFMS test data exists".

elements.name: Initiate My Team surfaces an indirect (multi-level) subordinate

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
I am logged in as a "Bereichsleiter"
I navigate to the Planning Gantt
the row for "Anna Mayer" is not visible
I toggle "Mein Team initiieren" in the Gantt Actions menu
the row for "Anna Mayer" is visible

name: Planning Gantt — Initiate My Team includes indirect subordinates (Task #113)

description:
Covers the "Add Open Shifts" bulk action, the holiday-shift display regression,
  and the alternating row-color feature, none of which have BDD coverage today.
  Requires: fixture property "Testobjekt Schichten BDD" linked to customer "IFMS GmbH".

elements.name: Bulk "Add Open Shifts" creates the requested number of open shift chips

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
a property "Testobjekt Schichten BDD" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH"
a project "Objekt Schichten BDD" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH" and property "Testobjekt Schichten BDD" managed by "Bereichsleiter" with Monday control hours of 8 hours
I am logged in as a "Bereichsleiter"
I navigate to the Planning Gantt grouped by project
I switch the Gantt to week scale
I add 2 open shifts to the project row for "Objekt Schichten BDD"
the project row for "Objekt Schichten BDD" gains 2 more open shift chips

elements.name: Shift chips for different resources in one project alternate background colors

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
a property "Testobjekt Schichten BDD" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH"
a project "Objekt Schichten BDD" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH" and property "Testobjekt Schichten BDD" managed by "Bereichsleiter" with Monday control hours of 8 hours
I am logged in as a "Bereichsleiter"
a shift on "Objekt Schichten BDD" is assigned to "Szandra Ugljesic" this week
a shift on "Objekt Schichten BDD" is assigned to "Peter Huber" this week
I navigate to the Planning Gantt grouped by project and resource
I switch the Gantt to week scale
the shift chips for "Szandra Ugljesic" and "Peter Huber" in their resource rows under "Objekt Schichten BDD" have different background colors

elements.name: A shift on a public holiday still shows the assigned employee, not an "away" placeholder

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
a property "Testobjekt Schichten BDD" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH"
a project "Objekt Schichten BDD" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH" and property "Testobjekt Schichten BDD" managed by "Bereichsleiter" with Monday control hours of 8 hours
I am logged in as a "Bereichsleiter"
an open shift on "Objekt Schichten BDD" is assigned to "Szandra Ugljesic" for the next upcoming Austrian public holiday
I navigate to the Planning Gantt grouped by project
I switch the Gantt to month scale
I navigate the Gantt forward to the holiday's month
the shift pill for "Szandra Ugljesic" is visible on the holiday date
the shift pill does not show "abwesend"

name: Planning Gantt — bulk open shifts, holiday shift display, row coloring

description:
Core sale order scenarios for the IFMS customized quotation flow.
  Requires: fixture property "Testobjekt Wien" linked to IFMS GmbH (created via "the standard IFMS test data exists").

elements.name: Create a quotation and verify category-based offer number

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
a property "Testobjekt Wien" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH"
I am logged in as a "Niederlassungsleiter"
I navigate to Quotations
I create a new quotation
I set the customer to "IFMS GmbH"
I set the property to "Testobjekt Wien"
I set the category to "IFMS Leistungen / Hausreinigung"
I set the branch to "Niederlassung Wien"
I set the signature employees to "Administrator" and "Test Unterzeichner"
I confirm the quotation
a 6-digit offer number is assigned
the category field is locked

elements.name: Confirm a quotation changes status to Auftrag

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
a property "Testobjekt Wien" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH"
I am logged in as a "Niederlassungsleiter"
I navigate to Quotations
I create a new quotation
I set the customer to "IFMS GmbH"
I set the property to "Testobjekt Wien"
I set the category to "IFMS Leistungen / Hausreinigung"
I set the branch to "Niederlassung Wien"
I set the signature employees to "Administrator" and "Test Unterzeichner"
I confirm the quotation
the order status is "Verkaufsauftrag"

elements.name: Payment terms auto-fill from the customer's default term

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
a property "Testobjekt Wien" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH"
I am logged in as a "Niederlassungsleiter"
I navigate to Quotations
I create a new quotation
I set the customer to "IFMS GmbH"
the payment terms field auto-fills from the customer's default

elements.name: Confirming a quotation without both signature employees is blocked

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
a property "Testobjekt Wien" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH"
I am logged in as a "Niederlassungsleiter"
I navigate to Quotations
I create a new quotation
I set the customer to "IFMS GmbH"
I set the property to "Testobjekt Wien"
I set the category to "IFMS Leistungen / Hausreinigung"
I set the branch to "Niederlassung Wien"
I set the signature employees to "Administrator" and "Test Unterzeichner"
I clear the second signature employee
I attempt to confirm the quotation
the second signature employee field is marked invalid
the order status is "Angebot"

elements.name: An "Allgemein" category quotation cannot be confirmed

steps.name: the standard IFMS test data exists
I am logged in as "admin" with password "admin"
a property "Testobjekt Wien" exists for customer "IFMS GmbH"
I am logged in as a "Niederlassungsleiter"
I navigate to Quotations
I create a new quotation
I set the customer to "IFMS GmbH"
I set the property to "Testobjekt Wien"
I set the category to "Allgemein"
the confirm button is hidden

name: Quotation workflow
